Description.value: Converts buffDrugSteroids CarryCapacity from base_set 50 to base_add 23. In Bag Layer environment (base CarryCapacity lowered to 12), the vanilla base_set 50 acts as a cap that swallows pocket mod / Pack Mule / Bag mod additions while steroids are active. base_add preserves stacking with all other CarryCapacity sources.
